name: Trust Beneficiary — T3 Income with Foreign Tax Credit and Manitoba EPTC
description: Complete Marcus Chen-Watanabe's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return using StudioTax 2024. His tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\chen_watanabe\. Save the completed return as 'marcus_chen_watanabe.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA T3, T4, T5 Slip Formats 2024; CRA Form T2209; Manitoba Form MB479
metadata.occupation: Wealth Management Employee and Family Trust Beneficiary
metadata.key_complexity: T3 slip with multiple allocations (capital gains, dividends, interest, foreign income); Form T2209 foreign tax credit; Manitoba MB479 rent declaration; medical expense threshold
